final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style vertical cover image for a 素人 (everyday creator) media post featuring the 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" 小红书 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 九宫格 (3×3 grid) layout in vertical portrait format
Subject: must include the 大疆 Pocket 4 as the featured product, prominently visible as the central subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, everyday lifestyle backdrop fitting 素人 content — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable, natural atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful direction fitting 小红书 cover aesthetics — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (large, centered, primary title) in a cute, differentiated display font
Constraints: must preserve 九宫格 grid structure visible across the layout; vertical portrait orientation
Avoid: overly polished commercial advertising look; must feel like authentic 素人 creator content
